identity.name: ponytail-forge
identity.description: Forces the laziest solution that still works: YAGNI, then stdlib, then native platform features, then existing dependencies, then a one-liner, before custom code. Single skill covering the whole ponytail-forge family via mode dispatch (forge/review/audit/debt/help) so it installs once instead of five times. Adapted from ponytail (DietrichGebert/ponytail, MIT).
